positive: A stylized, symmetrical portrait of a celestial forest within a geometric circular frame. The scene features glowing neon vines, stylized bioluminescent flora, and abstractly rendered cosmic fauna, forming a visually dense yet clean pattern. The color palette should be deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and luminous gold, contrasted sharply against a matte black background. Use a low-poly, synthwave aesthetic blended with intricate ornamental Art Deco patterns. Focus on sharp edges, high contrast, and clean silhouettes perfect for textile printing. Overhead, soft, circular radial lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, debris, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, messy background
